# Chertification

**Summary**: The replacement of carbonate minerals by silica.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-radwan|Radwan, 2016]] investigated chertification as a major diagenetic process in the formation.

## Scientific Context

- [[2016-radwan|Radwan, 2016]] Chertification impacts the porosity and mineralogy of the reservoir.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2016-radwan|Radwan, 2016]] identified via XRD and SEM-EDS.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Chert nodules occur at three distinct horizons (A, B, and C) in the upper part. ([[2016-radwan|Radwan, 2016, p. 49]])
